title: sartidia angolensis
intro: Sartidia angolensis, also known as the Angola sartidia, is a plant species in the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sartidia angolensis include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antiseptic. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
